aboutUs.heroSubtitle: Connecting travelers with breathtaking destinations and unforgettable experiences since the very beginning.
aboutUs.whoWeAreDesc1: At Pathora, we believe that travel is more than just visiting a new place. It is about immersing yourself in new cultures, creating lasting memories, and discovering the world from a fresh perspective.
aboutUs.whoWeAreDesc2: Our team of experienced travel experts meticulously crafts every itinerary to ensure you get the absolute best out of your precious vacation time. We handle the logistics so you can focus on the adventure.

values.globalExpertiseDesc: We have carefully vetted local guides and partners all across the globe.
values.safeTrustedDesc: Your safety and security are our highest priorities on every single trip.
values.tailoredForYouDesc: We offer flexible packages that can be customized to suit your unique needs.
values.seamlessExperienceDesc: From booking to getting back home, we ensure a smooth journey.

timeline.foundedDesc: Started with a small team and a big dream to revolutionize travel.
timeline.first10kDesc: Reached our first major milestone of satisfied globe-trotters.
timeline.expanded60Desc: Grew our network to offer tours on nearly every continent.
timeline.digitalFirstDesc: Launched our seamlessly integrated online platform.
timeline.happy92kDesc: Continuing our mission to make world-class travel accessible.

aboutUs.ctaDescription: Join thousands of satisfied travelers. Book your dream vacation today and let us handle all the details.
